narrative_constraints.statement: Private gardens without management/design control are not permitted; cluttering ('verrommeling') must be avoided.

provenance.quoted_text:
geen privetuinen zonder regie
voorkomen van verrommeling

reasons: Clearly stated as a design quality requirement in a beeldkwaliteitplan (image quality plan), which is guidance rather than binding regels.
Accompanied by a negative reference image (cross symbol), indicating this is a prohibition in quality terms.

narrative_constraints.statement: Private outdoor spaces (terrace and loggia) must be integrated as part of the architecture, not added ad hoc.

provenance.quoted_text:
terras en loggia
Prive buitenruimtes zijn onderdeel van de architectuur

reasons: Clearly stated quality requirement from beeldkwaliteitplan, supported by a positive reference image (checkmark symbol).
Beeldkwaliteitplan is guidance rather than binding regels, capping confidence below 0.85.

urban_intent_passages: Privé buitenruimtes op maaiveldniveau: geen privetuinen zonder regie, voorkomen van verrommeling. Terras en loggia: prive buitenruimtes zijn onderdeel van de architectuur. Referentie terrassen aan binnentuin.
